== Notes for [[Item:Q105376|Q105376]] ==

01/01/2011 bo. Amon, San Jose, CR http://www.genealogia.or.cr/foro/viewtopic.php?f=21&t=85

--------------------
=== GEDCOM Note ===
Origen de los Fundadores de Texas, Nuevo Mexico, Coahuila, y NuevoLeon, by Guillermo Garmendia Leal. Page 126. (Research):http://www.somosprimos.com/inclan/salazar.htm n.10

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000014396297872

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
